title: Standard Module Spine
summary: Defines the locked 15-role sequential spine all GCSE revision modules must follow, from hook through to chapter complete; now superseded by CLAUDE.md.
notes: Document opens with an explicit Superseded notice. No formal ADR frontmatter or numbered filename, but content is a single architectural decision (module spine order) with locked rules and variant exceptions — consistent with ADR pattern. Status is Superseded so locked is false. Confidence medium because ADR signals come from content rather than filename/frontmatter convention.
